APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND DAN STONE VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE FROM 8/9/21 TO 10/6/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT SETS THE MATTER AS A JURY TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Vanessa Pouladian, Esq., 818-853-5142, appearing for John Stweart Company, Defendant
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Ms. Pouladian stated that she does not contest to the tentative ruling.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, DAN STONE DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states facts to state all causes of action. Factual issues and the veracity of allegations will not be addressed on a demurrer.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
